name: ATW Tech Inc.
summary: ATW Tech Inc., together with its subsidiaries, provides financial technology solutions in Canada, the United States, Europe, and internationally. The company offers its solutions through various Web platforms, including VoxTel, an interactive communication, landline, and mobile carrier billing phone solution; VuduMobile, a specialized text messaging solution for enterprises; Option.vote, a voting system for unions, political parties, professional associations, and others; and Bloomed, a cloud-based platform to manage data on consumers and their behaviors. The company was formerly known as AtmanCo Inc. ATW Tech Inc. is headquartered in Montreal, Canada.
